name: Vietnam Romantic Honeymoon Holiday 14 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ky Son Village  - Halong Bay - Hoi An - Nha Trang - Ho Chi Minh City
highlights: Explore the UNESCO-listed Hoi An Ancient Town, known for its well-preserved architecture and romantic atmosphere.
Find tranquility with your beloved in the peaceful surroundings of Ky Son Village.
Witness the enchanting sunset and savor a romantic candlelit dinner aboard a vessel in Nha Trang.
Embark on a private Vespa scooter food tour in the bustling streets of Ho Chi Minh City.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Welcome to Hanoi, the capital of Vietnam! Greet our tour guide and transfer directly to your hotel in Hanoi and relax. NOTE:  Check-in time will be at 14:00 (An additional charge will be applied if you want early check-in)

Evening

Enjoy a romantic Vietnamese dinner with candles at the restaurant to mark the start of your new journey in life. We hope you’ll have more and more joy in the future. Have free time to explore Hanoi with your lover or just come back to your hotel to relax.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00: Meet our tour guide and begin your half-day city tour after breakfast to explore the most famous spot in Hanoi. Visit Vietnam’s first university - the Temple of Literature which is a symbol of the significant influence of Confucianism on Vietnamese culture. Wander through the tranquil courtyards, admire the elegant pavilions, and learn about the rich history and scholarly traditions. Continue with a trip to the iconic One Pillar Pagoda, one of Vietnam’s most well-known temples for its unique architecture. Perched atop a single stone pillar rising from a tranquil lotus pond, thi...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Thai Nguyen - Journey to the Heart of Nui Coc Lake
itinerary.description: Begin your adventure with a scenic drive into the countryside, where the serene beauty of Nui Coc Lake awaits. Embark on a peaceful boat tour, gliding and learning the legends that surround this enchanting freshwater lake. In the afternoon, settle into the welcoming comfort of a Farmstay nestled amidst nature. Enjoy a delicious BBQ dinner made with fresh, locally sourced ingredients. As night falls, relax in the tranquil atmosphere, breathe in the fresh mountain air, and experience the serene pace of countryside living.

itinerary.title: Thai Nguyen - Tea Hills - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

As the sun gently illuminates the rolling tea hills, join local farmers in the age-old tradition of hand-picking fresh tea leaves. Discover the intricate process of tea production - from plucking to roasting - and even try your hand at picking tea leaves under the guidance of experienced artisans. After your tea experience, enjoy a hearty lunch at the Farmstay, rounding off a morning filled with discovery and connection to local culture. Afternoon

Get on the transfer car and go back to Hanoi for a rest.

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have a light breakfast before our driver picks you up around 08:00 - 08:30. Transfer to the fantastic Halong Bay, listed as a World Heritage for its outstanding natural beauty. 11:30 - 12:00: Get on board and then enjoy a cruise around the stunning seascape with a delicious local seafood lunch. Afternoon

Join some activities on the boat such as visiting a cave, kayaking, or swimming in the sea. 17:30: Get back to the junk for relaxation

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Fly to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your second day in Halong with an early tai-chi class in the pretty sunrise then have breakfast. Then, follow the schedule and explore the most stunning caves and islands in the bay. Get back on board then enjoy the brunch while cruising back to the mainland. 11:30 - 12:00: The boat reaches the port, let's say goodbye to the crew and get on transfer service to Noi Bai Airport for the flight to Da Nang. Afternoon

Take an hour's flight to Da Nang then transfer to the hotel in Hoi An and check in to the hotel

itinerary.title: Hoi An Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your journey unfolds at the lively Hoi An Market, where vendors, fresh ingredients, handmade goods, and the constant hum of local life blend into an atmosphere that’s both chaotic and captivating. The mix of vivid colors, bustling stalls, and inviting aromas offers a genuine taste of the town’s character. From here, you’ll make your way to the Phuc Kien Chinese Assembly Hall, recognizable by its bold architecture, symbolic dragon carvings, and ornate details. Inside, you’ll gain insight into the spiritual traditions of the community as you observe the family altar and watch residents ...

itinerary.title: Hoi An Free Day
itinerary.description:
Have the whole day with just two of you. Enjoy this precious time in this gorgeous town. We highly recommend some optional tours as below if you want to explore Hoi An further. Authentic Hoi An - Cooking Class & Biking Full Day	FROM US $67 /pax
Cam Thanh Coconut Village & Lantern Making Half Day	FROM US $35 /pax
Tra Que Village by Bike & Cooking Class Half Day	FROM US $42 /pax
Cu Lao Cham Full Day Join Tour from Hoi An	FROM US $39 /pax
Bike to My Son Sanctuary from Hoi An Day Trip	FROM US $99 /pax

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Da Nang - Train to Nha Trang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy your last time in Hoi An and say goodbye to the town. Travel to Da Nang and take a train to Nha Trang, the paradise for beach holidays. Free at leisure at the beach city. You and your beloved can go to the stunning beach, immerse in the emerald water, or stroll under the alluring sunset.

itinerary.title: Nha Trang City Discover
itinerary.description: Have breakfast at the hotel and get closer with many amusing activities, below are some recommendations. Experience a special treatment of mud bath in Nha Trang - a thing you should never miss once visiting this wonderful city. Visit VinWonders Nha Trang, a high-class resort and amusement park. This place is perfect for honeymooners with enchanting sceneries, interesting games, aquariums, stunning check-in spots, and so much more. Or you two can simply relax and enjoy a soothing spa session.

itinerary.title: Nha Trang - Romantic Dinner on a Luxury Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

You and your beloved will have free time for the whole morning and afternoon. Relax at the hotel or explore Nha Trang during your leisure time

Evening

Choosing a suitable outfit and preparing for a wonderful activity for the newlywed - Sunset Cocktail and Dinner on the Emperor Cruise. 17:00 - 17:30: Our driver will pick you up at the hotel and transfer you to Cau Da Port. Then, get on the Emperor Cruise Junk and enjoy a welcome drink. Start the voyage under a romantic sunset while witnessing Nha Trang Bay's spectacular beauty

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Free Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy a delicious breakfast at the hotel. Get ready for another full day at leisure in Nha Trang

You may book a package of Spa Treatments, yoga classes, and Tai Chi classes to unwind. NOTE: Spa Treatment (minimum 2 treatments per night per person) daily. If you are an adventurous couple, we would like to recommend optional island tours that will take you to the pristine islands of Nha Trang:

Nha Trang City Tour and Islands Full day	FROM US $81 /pax
Experience Royal Life on Emperor Cruise Full Day	FROM US $95 /pax

itinerary.title: Nha Trang - Fly to Ho Chi Minh City - Food tour by Motorbike at night
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your hotel and pack your luggage. Transfer from the hotel to Nha Trang Airport by shuttle bus. Fly to Ho Chi Minh City, a dynamic city with a bustling nightlife. Afternoon

Arrive at Tan Son Nhat Airport. Take a drive to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City to check in and relax
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy your last morning in Ho Chi Minh City with your lover. Have breakfast at the hotel's restaurant then free at leisure until our driver arrives. Travel to the airport for your flight back home. Goodbye! We hope you will have a wonderful married life. NOTE: The hotel check-out time is 12:00

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam, as per itinerary.
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights: Hanoi –Danang; Nha Trang -Ho Chi Minh
Train ticket Da Nang - Nha Trang
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
